name: Cauldron Energy Limited
analysis: CXU has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.0690. Trade idea: entry A$0.0960, stop A$0.0495, target A$0.2355 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
